calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Continued To Dec-19-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Connie Davenport and Charles Williams (Petitioners). Greer Smith for Sharon Williams.

Counsel disagree on some of the details in the written agreement. Mr. Dougherty stated that he will drop the petition when the signed agreement is received. The Petition to Remove Trustee and Appoint Successor Trustee was continued to December 19, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Continued To Oct-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Continued To Oct-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Continued To Sep-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Aug-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Aug-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for Sharon Williams.

Ms. Smith requested a continuance to obtain the rest of the bank records. The matter was continued to August 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To Jun-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Continued To Jun-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Apr-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Connie Davenport. Greer Smith for Sharon Williams (Prior Successor Trustee).

Mr. Smith stated that she was still waiting for the Wells Fargo records. Mr. Dougherty stated that they agreed to continue the matter and that Ms. Greer will have the accounting on file by April 18, 2011. The matter was continued to April 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Continued To Mar-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Continued To Dec-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Continued To Nov-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Connie Davenport and Charles Williams (Petitioners). Peter Tamases appearing specially for and with Sharon Williams (Respondent). Dennis Vann for Paula Bibbs. Greer Smith for and with Sharon Williams.

Ms. Greer stated that she would be filing the Substition of Attorney to represent Ms. Williams tomorrow. All Parties agreed to a continuance on the accounting. Mr. Dougherty stated that they would mediate all other issues. The accounting is to be filed by November 15, 2010. Staus of filing of the accounting was continued to November 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status hearing on mediation set for October 25, 2010 was continued to December 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Continued To Oct-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for Sharon Williams (Respondent). Michael Dougherty for Connie Davenport and Charles Williams.

Mr. Tomases requested a 30 day continuance stating that he was retained on Friday. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Chevonne being appointed as Successor Trustee, the assets, the accountings, mediation and the family dynamics. The Parties stepped out of the courtroom to discuss the matter. Upon returning, the Parties stipulated to Sharon Williams being removed as Trustee, to Paula Bibbs being appointed as Successor Trustee with full and independent powers, to a Probate Referee being appointed and to waiving bond for Paula Bibbs. In addition, the Parties stipulated to the accounting being filed by September 10, 2010, to having all other issues go to mediation and to the Parties dividing the furniture equally with shipping to be paid from the Trust. Status of filing of the accounting was set for September 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition to Remove Trustee and Appoint Successor Trustee was continued to October 25, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The hearing on the accounting is to be specially set for October 25, 2010. The Court requested a resignation from Sharon, a consent to serve from Ms. Bibbs, and that the stipulation be reduced to writing and approved by all Parties. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 25, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Various Bailiffs.
